items.title: The Bucks return for Giannis reminds me a little of what they got for Kareem way back when — a bunch of good players (Bridgeman, Winters, Meyers, Elmore Smith) but no true stars.
items.author: Chad Finn
items.body_excerpt:
The Bucks return for Giannis reminds me a little of what they got for Kareem way back when — a bunch of good players (Bridgeman, Winters, Meyers, Elmore Smith) but no true stars. 

One difference: the Bucks got no picks in that deal.
